name: Eden Skye Always-On Bridge Blueprint
description: n8n workflow blueprint for 24/7 Eden Skye Studios discovery, analysis, idea generation, media packet creation, watermark validation, and approval routing.

nodes.name: AI Gateway Drafting
nodes.purpose: Draft content, ideas, prompts, analysis, and packet summaries.

nodes.name: Trend Discovery Cron Mirror
nodes.purpose: Refresh source-backed trend and viral pattern queue.

nodes.name: 360 Day Content Plan Builder
nodes.purpose: Generate draft-only 360-day content calendar structure and first 30 days of high-detail queue.

nodes.name: Media Task Builder
nodes.purpose: Create image, video, avatar, voice, and editing tasks with source-first asset logic.

nodes.name: Schedule Draft Builder
nodes.purpose: Create draft-only Metricool/SocialHub scheduling packets without public publishing.

nodes.name: Analytics Review
nodes.purpose: Review post, hook, hashtag, model, CTA, and schedule performance.

nodes.name: Winner Cloning
nodes.purpose: Clone winning patterns into new draft queues after performance data exists.

nodes.name: Write Receipt
nodes.purpose: Persist n8n event receipt, generator receipt, watermark receipt, and approval receipt.
